ValidationRule.description: Submission Status must align with status.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(Status__c) = "Completed", TEXT(Submission_Status__c) != "Client Approves Completion", TEXT(Submission_Status__c) != "Project Task Complete" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For Client Status to be Completed, submission status must be Client Approves Completion or Project Task Complete.
